narrative:
Kettering 4-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,108 registered voters, with 48.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
